original: [var0 |A shocked gasp is your only defense [var1 |as a miniature trident-shaped dart smashes into your shield. Not a vital point; you quickly yank the waspish thing free before it does any lasting harm, growling through clenched teeth. Before tossing it away, you note the mechanized tips curling inwards... ] The laquine utters a grotesque sound, lurching in your direction. |Your eyes narrow to diamond pinpoints just before the vile implement finds purchase. Sidestepping it, the waspish dart hurtles into something harder and thicker than itself, causing it to shatter apart in a hazardous pile of fragments. “Grrh,” she bristles beneath arched eyes. ]

[var0 |Lithe lapine limbs twist in a flurry of smooth, practiced motions; the icy blue gleam of the rabbit’s cryo-sword disorients and distracts your eyes in a showy advance. The lop-eared murderess leaps off the ball of one heel, blade couched for a vicious rend. [var1 |As she’s thrown her entire body into the attack, you opt not to parry or block, but duck away. Your skillful dodge avoids the mid-flight correction that nearly shaved a few proverbial pounds from your scalp. You fall back a few paces, shaking the lingering cold from your [pc.skinFurScales] and hoping that your microbots will keep your blood warm and flowing. |Slash — cold energy cleaves through your [rand |[pc.arm] |chest |[pc.legOrLegs] |shoulder ]; a gaspless scream squeaks out of your throat. It’s nothing as pedestrian as physical agony: scorching frostbite claws through your veins and arteries like a rampaging monster, draining all the heat from your bloodstream. The pale blue bruises of hypothermia appear around the injury sites. “Khhuh...” bristles your opponent. ] |[sophora.nameKnown |Sophora |The laquine ] closes the narrow gap in a gale of kicks and slashes, swinging like a vengeful butcher. [var1 |Avoiding the middle slash is impossible. An edge of honed monofilament bites into your [pc.skinFurScalesNoun], drawing a razor-thin gash across your [rand |[pc.arm] |chest |[pc.legOrLegs] |torso ]. [var2 |Although your shield saved you from an arterial nicking, the sheer force behind the piercing strike quivers through your [pc.skinFurScalesNoun]. |[var3 |Your mouth reacts to the lacerating agony instantly, screaming out a keening response to the deep, serious injury. You’re bleeding! |Sharp, numbing pain; you bark out a curse and a scream as you recoil, checking the wound. It’s serious... horribly debilitating. Dying on a blade is the last way you wanna go. ] ] |When one’s life flashes before their very eyes, they’re freed up to be bold and unpredictable. They have to be. Your [pc.hands] catch the laquine’s arm in a miracle of timing and positioning, arresting her momentum; seizing on her split second of confusion, you rear your head back and ram your forehead against hers. Knockback! “Gllkhhh!!” Shock and frustration shudder through her as she pounds a palm to her brow and flourishes her blade. ] ]

“Mnnh...” The bunny blackguard’s cryo-sword flashes into nothingness as a sickly-green glow rises to take its place. Both of her arms criss-cross, plasma and kinetic firepower brought to bear; a double-tap of energy and gunpowder screams in your direction! [var0|Lacking any cover, you brace for the worst. [var1|A fist-sized orb of plasma discharge crashes into your shield, detonating in a shower of blinding primary colors. Staggered by the impact, you fall back just in time as the kinetic rain hits you.|The brussels sprout-sized sphere of gurgling plasma impacts your [pc.skinFurScalesNoun], exploding in a blinding shower of green fire. As you stumble to the ground, a well-aimed rain of bullets nearly finishes the job.] All you hear in the aftermath of a perfect hit is an unnerving laugh.|You whip your body to one side; the cabbage-sized bolt of plasma misses you cleanly, bursting apart against [var2|the rock wall in an explosion that shudders through the unstable mine shaft|a stack of crates in an explosion of green fire|the scenery]. [var1|Alas, you’re not quick enough to dodge the rain of gunfire that followed it: the smooth screen of your shield fizzes mid-way, crackling violently as the bullets are repulsed.|Midway through your dodge, a barrage of lead pills enter your [pc.skinFurScalesNoun] and exit the other side. It’s hard work ignoring the wounds, harder work still for your microbots to repair the GSWs.] “Hrrmm... mhmhm!” chortles your lop-eared opponent, unhinged animal sounds corroding your resolve.|Dodging even one aspect of a combined arms attack is difficult enough - [var2|you barely avoid a storm of bullets; Zhèng Shi’s hollow tunnels eat the swarm of lead bees, others pinging off|a stack of materials and crates in your periphery end up eating the damage; the swarm of lead pills penetrate with ear-tingling ricochets|your surroundings absorb the rain of bullets]. [var1|There’s no avoiding the plasma: the nauseous fireball impacts with your shield, exploding in a blinding display of flame-licked primary colors.|A bale-green fireball of energy impacts your [pc.skinFurScalesNoun] a split-second later, bursting apart to great effect. You stagger backwards, swiping desperately at the lingering burns.] “Kuhhhheh...” rasps the temerious hare, a tone of instability and dour breathiness that needles at your mind.|In a stunning display of reflex-intensive maneuvering, you somehow dance between the combined arms attack. Baleful plasma sails past your shoulder, trailed by bullets, both attacks impacting [var2|the mine-shaft in a dazzling explosion that ricochets and shudders through one of the many veins in Zhèng Shi’s body|a stack of crates and the wall in an incident of collateral damage that leaves an entire palette of goods FUBAR|transforming the local area into a miniature DMZ]. Before the enemy rabbit can rebound, you charge in and
!\n\t\t\n\t\t“KUH!” she belts out defiantly, hunched over and fighting for her balance. A snake-like sound hisses through her teeth when she produces her cryo-blade once again.]

[sophora.nameKnown|Sophora|The laquine] storms into you, striking at your [pc.weapon] in a wild rage. You retreat, avoiding a tiring clash of weaponry, only to spot her perform an arcane gesture and spray bullets in your direction on a jet-assisted trajectory. Pancaking yourself to the floor saves your neck from a slash; next, you roll to your back and scurry away, the laquine liquidly pirouetting in the air, flying with her boosters as though she were in zero-G. Plumes of blue-white spew from micromodules located on the backs of her hips and shoulders, from large thrusters on the front and back of her calves. She points at you with the tip of her sword, a dark shape of approaching vengeance. She’s taken flight, but this angel of death cannot stay afloat forever.
No longer tripped!

Engines guttering, the Jumper lands neatly and deactivates her jet-boosters. Looks like her fuel has run dry. Whether her paws are on the ground or in the air, she’s fully capable of destroying everything in her path.

original: [sophora.nameKnown |Sophora |The laquine ] becomes a yawing whirlwind, landing blow after crackling blow on your defenses. It never feels like she’s putting all of her energy into it until she swishes to the side, blade couched over a shoulder for a fatal slash. [var0 |Disdaining reflexes to physically stonewall the poised attack ends poorly: Fwoozhh! goes the reaper’s blade as it hews effortlessly through your torso; the incorporeal slash flash-freezes your lungs, your throat, slows your heart; a frostbitten wheeze crawls out of your mouth as a successive gunshot connects with your [pc.skinFurScalesNoun]. [var1 |Although your shield saved you from life-threatening injuries, the touch of deathly chill lingers. Your body stitches with unseen agony as you pick yourself up off the ground. |Blood seeps from the flesh wound on your shoulder as your whole body surrenders to the deathly, paralyzing chill. Picking yourself up off the ground takes a heroic effort. ] “Keheh...” She grins, salivating. |The incredibly agile Jumper capitalizes on your fumbling; her body flows in something resembling an expert martial arts’ move — you manage to avoid a surprise gunshot but not the cleave of that wispy blade through your torso. A hoarse, frostbitten squeal crawls up your flash-frozen throat, indescribable coldness robbing you of breath; you tumble twice and wheeze, [var1 |thankful that your shield at least protected you from the real physical pain |

[sophora.nameKnown |Sophora |The wild laquine ] carves dummy attacks to test your guard. You never notice her holster her firearm and draw a chunky energy weapon. A white glimmer swells into a roiling ball of plasma that’s discharged only a split second later, the massive recoil throwing her arm back like an elephant’s kick. [var0 |Dodging... is useless! The projectile is enormous and your poor positioning offers no sanctuary. As the emerald light of approaching vengeance blinds you, you throw up your [pc.arms] and tank the hit. Impact — a cataclysmic explosion of green fire launches you several feet. [var1 |You come skidding to a halt against a jagged wall where the back of your head absorbs a blow that jars your eyes. |You crash land in a pile of construction materials, suffering the scrapes of tools. |It’s like falling off a swoop bike at top speed: you skid and roll until the laws of physics tire of ragdolling you. ][var2 | Thank fuck your shield still had some juice. | Everything hurts like absolute hell. ] “Hmf...” the laquine snarls five steps away as you drag your jangled body from the [var1 |floor |wreckage |ground ]... |In a buttock-clenching rush, you flatten yourself to the ground and cover your head. The orb of balefire sails danger-close - the details are comprehensive enough for your glands to think so - before impacting [var3|Zhèng Shi’s interior. Awesome firepower quakes through the station. Everybody felt that. Were security at all reliable here, alarms would be going off now.|something in your blind spot. Given the rattlings, the explosive force must have tickled one of the planet’s faultlines.] Instead, there’s only that insidious Jumper when you stand, sneering in silence, vaguely highlighted by rapidly-dimming green. “Hrvvvrrr...” ]
You are stunned!
"+{var1}.capitalize({var0})+" "+({var2}?"are":"is")+" stunned!

Forgoing technique and skill, [sophora.nameKnown |Sophora |the Jumper ] strokes her thumb across the side of her gun’s barrel and plants her feet. She aims down the sights and squeezes the trigger. Her finger does not uncurl. [var0 |A rain of bullets pours; caught in the crossfire, you drop to the ground and roll this way and that, so many fight or flight chemicals flowing that you can’t tell if you’re getting hit or not. Every conceivable emotion flares over the next four seconds you spend being a shooting gallery. Only when her mag runs dry do you open your eyes and bound to your [pc.footOrFeet], [var1 |no worse for the wear courtesy of your shield! |grazed and wounded by the ballistic suppression. ] “Tch - !” Reloaded, the laquine stalks forward. |You cringe, diving for the first thing your brain detects as cover. [var2 |Not a single bullet hits you in the ore trench. How fortunate there was a deep enough depression to deflect ricocheting bullets! |For once, you’re glad people are leaving crates and junk around the place. |Lots of natural cover exists, and luckily, you were able to find one that could withstand the punishment. ] When you emerge, the air is choked with gunsmoke. The Jumper feeds her pistol, angrily levels it. “Grrh...!” ]
(Miss)
You are staggered by the hail of fire!

original: “Grrhhhhh!” A rumbling growl crawls from the laquine’s stomach; she stretches backwards, arms flexing out; mad bloodthirst suddenly charges, stomp-stomp-stomp, louder and louder; you are transfixed by a maelstrom, and the full weight of the she-devil’s body will be behind whatever comes...! [var0 |Something roots you to the ground, denies your reflex to move away. It all happens in a dark flash: [sophora.nameKnown |Sophora |the Jumper ] reaches your personal space, twists backwards, and slugs you. One of the most monstrously powerful haymakers connects with the top of your skull, and your whole body crunches forwards[pc.isGoo | |, the jumbling force traveling through your improperly-bent spine ]. Nothing makes sense, but you unfold and stumble backwards, falling flat on the ground. Why doesn’t she capitalize on this? You have to be out cold after that... but no: reality returns, and you’re lying there. Adrenaline flows again, an urging stimulant to carry on. If you make it out of this, you’re going to need this concussion looked at... “Hrrrmfff...” The laquine exhales, clenching her fist tight. |[var1 |Whatever anxious emotion roots you to the ground, it’s knocked clean from your mind as the rabbit twists backwards and slugs you with one of the most vicious haymakers in history. The monstrous strength of her attack sends you reeling, twirling, and stumbling. It takes too long for the confusion and delirium to subside. How you’re still on your feet, or why she didn’t capitalize on it, content to watch you stumble in agony, perhaps, are questions best left unanswered. She heaves for breath, grins, and stalks closer once more. “Vrhhh...” |She won’t stop until she reaches you. Time your dodge.... [sophora.nameKnown |Sophora |the Jumper ] descends like a shroud of all-consuming evil, twists backwards, and channels all her hate, fury, and intent into a single haymaker. Even dodging it, even side-stepping it at the perfect moment, watching her skid forward... you could feel that energy. Whatever else you’re feeling, it’s not nearly as bad as taking that hit would have been. “Tehhv...!” ] ]

original: [sophora.nameKnown |Sophora |The sable Jumper ] launches herself at you leg-first, brawny thighs levering as she advances in a sequence of roundhouse kicks aimed for the head. One normal, one reverse, one back and forth, one feint, — you are backed into a wall. Perched on her toes, the lapine demon coils for a coup-de-grace. [var0 |The whole of [var2 |Zhèng Shi |Mhen’ga |Tarkus |Myrellion |Dhaal ], all its ambience, and even the rush of combat disappear at the singular moment her foot batters your skull. Sensations of movement follow a rebooting of the senses; you scrabble on the ground like a beached fish, everything a muted sea of disapparated colors. There’s her wordless chiding in your [pc.ears], haunting whispers of danger that you can’t silence. Standing is impossible, the urgings of gravity overriding your jangled survival instincts. The stunning head-kick has left you at her mercies. |[var1 |A meaty impact — the hit and subsequent concussion are instantaneous; your sight dissolves into blackness, as if you were just locked inside a washing machine cranked to super spin cycle. All that you can sense is your body tumbling across the floor in a nauseous haze of stunning pain. A motorbike in the process of crashing. Thunderous aches abound; somehow, you manage to get to your [pc.footOrFeet], dizzy but capable. Good thing your skull has more consistency than a watermelon. [silly |Seriously, craniums in survival-horror games have the durability of rotten pumpkins, swear to God... ] She glowers, brandishing a deadly leg like an executioner’s axe. “Rhhrhrh...” |Turning an attack into an opportunity is part and parcel of fighting for your life. You bend your body in the same direction of her foot — the sole of her foot grazes your [pc.hairNoun]; as you’ve been careful not to over-extend, you redirect all your momentum into a kick of your own, [pc.leg] lashing out! Your [pc.foot] slams into her glute with a satisfyingly chunky impact, driving her off for a precious second. “Tehhhh!” She stomps both feet and reassumes her posture. ] ]

original: [sophora.nameKnown |Sophora |The laquine ] hurls herself at you with matchless athleticism; muscle-packed limbs weave through the air: kicks, punches, and the occasional knife slash all aimed for vital points. A kick-boxer in her prime, just what is this technique...?! [var0 |Once you take a skyward palm strike to the chin, you fall out of balance and succumb to a flurry of blows; a heel as dense as dreadnought plating rams into your gut. Doubled over and wheezing, you’re helpless to avoid her axe kick — the foot falls like the blade of a guillotine, smashing you into the [var3|rock|ground|floor]. Two hands clamp to your shoulders and hurl you against a neighboring surface. That you crumple instantly isn’t enough: her sole jabs into your solar plexus; the toes twist; it withdraws, and those powerful hands take hold of you once again, fling you over her body in a judo throw that drapes you against another wall. She’s enjoying this. Having had the shit kicked out of you, not to mention your entire body flung like a garbage bag, you’re stunned. There may be no avoiding the next attack... |[var1 |Fighting [sophora.nameKnown |Sophora |her ] is something of a dance. You have to attune yourself to your partner — she is incapable of restraint. Dodging that chin strike was lucky, but your body cramps with exhaustion long before it ends. How she shifts her muscles like that... you can’t know: the energy of an axe kick barely dodged is shunted into her other leg, and she twists around and lands a kick square in your gut. You about cough up a lung in the time it takes for her to leap forwards and go for the killing blow but, somehow, you avoid it. Where you stood, her foot is [var2 |stuck halfway through a tree trunk |jammed up to the knee in a pile of scrap |dug deeply into a trench wall |socketed in a destroyed ventilation unit |[var2 |embedded in a mineral vein | |sitting in a crater-like dent in the wall ] ]. She peers over her shoulder at you like an owl, arch, scornful, vigilant. “Tcheehhhh...” She unfucks herself and clenches her free fist. Veins are surely bursting under the skin. |In some twisted sense, close-quarters-combat is like a dance. Know yourself and know thy partner, and you can follow them without fail. You test her reaction by grappling for her arm when she goes for a predictable chin-strike; she yanks free and throws an instant punch. This too you avoid, countering with an elbow jab that does put pause to her action... ...And gives her all the momentum needed to perform a somersault kick. Again, you’re not such a pushover yourself! The laquine lands neatly and cannonballs in your direction, frantic bloodthirst propelling her knife-arm. Lurching to the left, sliding to the right, you build up for another parry. One slash aimed for your gut — you backstep; one jab to the shoulder, you twist away, and just as an uppercut is launched, you [pc.isTaur |kick your hindlegs out in an a ‘tauric approximation of the drop kick, sending her flying back into a wall |[pc.isGoo |entrap her feet in a puddle of slime and knock her back with a skillful tackle |[pc.isNaga |envelop her lower half in your serpentine coils and fling her away with profound muscular control |jump into the air and perform an award-winning drop kick that plasters her cleanly upon a wall ] ] ]! “Grrrrhhh... grrkk!” she snarls wolfishly. Whatever that suit’s made of protected her from any real damage, but no armor exists that provides sanctuary for one’s sensitive pride. You don’t know what game she’s playing, but you can glimpse the finishing move. ] ]
(Miss)
You are stunned!

Shoving into your personal space, the deadly laquine blatantly feints and dummies before crouching, pivoting, and out-thrusting one leg. [var0 |[var1 |Gravity beckons and the rear of your skull answers. You hit the floor hard, pulsing aches buzzing in your cranium. You can only describe what happens next as a piano falling dead center on your gut: the Jumper lands a brutal stomp into your sternum. The only thing keeping you conscious is the desire to avoid any future suffering, but knowing that you’ve been stunned isn’t helping you shake the bone-shattering delirium. “Keheh,” she rasps breathily, sounding almost amused. Her foot slides around your [pc.skinFurScalesNoun] before kicking again. |And she gets it. Rooted by indecision or some other traitorous mental function, you’re upended by the fiend

original: At least you didn’t hit your head on the way down, enabling you to barrel roll away from the follow-up stomp. “Kuhuummhm,” she laughs, coming at you again. Damn rabbit! ] |Going for the legs is fighting dirty, but if you aren’t, you don’t want to win. Jumping over the attack is simple, but countering is not. As soon as you touch ground, you take the easiest shot ever, socking her right in the jaw. “Graah!” She stumbles back; that was felt. Such a lust for revenge in her eyes now... she rotates her head, snaps the cricks from it, and reasserts. ]
context: <<POS:01813354>> textify([' At least you didn’t hit your head on the way down'...])

original: You end up knocked on your ass!
context: <> combatOutput("\nYou end up knocked on your ass!")

original: You are stunned!

Sophora’s pinched lips spread slightly; her right arm raises, and the sleek vambrace armoring it produces a bladed arrowhead. A moment later, the launcher spits the dart with an explosive report! [var0 |[var1 |The puncture-dart tries to burrow into your [pc.leg], but is deflected by the barrier of your shield and driven into the ground. She yanks it back with a snarl. |Too slow to dodge too fast a shot, the tip breaches the [pc.skinFurScalesNoun] covering your [pc.legOrLegsNoun]. From there, its lamprey prongs burrow into your body like a fox digging a fresh hole. Torn between watching the rabbit and freeing yourself, you spot a sudden movement in your periphery. [var2 |The world goes horizontal as you’re pulled into the air by your [pc.foot]. Landing with a thud and a gasp, the recoiling metal claws at your [pc.skinFurScalesNoun] as it goes. You’ve been tripped. [var3|Worse than that, a frightening, dizzy nausea ripples into your sight. Your heart is pumping poison all the way through you!] |Reacting on adrenalin, a strike with your [pc.weapon] dislodges the hook before she can act. The wire twirls through the air as it retracts into her gauntlet with a grinding of gyros. ] ] |Jumping away isn’t an overreaction. Nothing is ever certain with this mangy cur. Your heart skips a beat as you regain situational awareness, watch the rope retract with a hair-raising schlink. Sophora’s fingers wheel; her head cranes to one side. What you think is a tiny smile is just another scowl. “Hrmff...” ]
context: <<POS:01814601>> textify(['\\n\\t\\tSophora’s pinched lips spread slightly; her '...])

original: The coals of [sophora.nameKnown |Sophora’s |the heinous Jumper’s ] eyes harden as she lumbers your way, radiating malefic purpose. She claws at you relentlessly. As her loose attacks deflect off your [pc.weapon], her dulled perniciousness chills you more than its full presence ever had — whatever she plans, it’s the only thing that lights up the dark in her eyes. A foreboding sensation steals over you when you see her vambrace subtly shift and... something falls from it; a tiny motor whirrs. [var0 |Instead of retreat as instincts demand, you lose your nerve and put all your strength into a repulsing strike... ...And are promptly deflected. [sophora.nameKnown |Sophora |The laquine ] bends in reverse, grasping at and then twisting your [pc.arm], pulling you out of balance; and, whilst you’re extended, her armored palm meets your [pc.face] — a singular, disabling strike. The same arm then maneuvers you — dazed, spinning, stunned — into an inescapable chokehold, and as the rabbit’s cold breath enters your [pc.ear], a horrifying revelation gathers at the edge of your awareness. [pc.isTaur |Your head is pulled back by a slim wire. “Acck!” Your eyes bulge; there’s nothing you can do to stop the woman from seating herself on your back and seizing you by the neck like some animal in her deadly reins. A feeling of vertigo rapidly settles and the conscious world is warped by suffocation. Your panicked fingers search for the cord as it eats into your [pc.skinFurScales]

. |A slim wire coils ravenously around your neck; your eyes go completely wide the moment your head is pulled back. “Ckkaah..!” Your body is lifted from the ground, your [pc.fingers] prying desperately for a monofilament cord as it eats into your [pc.skinFurScales]
context: <<POS:01818176>> textify(['.\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t|A slim wire coils ravenously around yo'...])

original: [rand |The frightfully strong laquine redoubles her grip, straining the wire deeper and closing off your airway; aspiration ceases; you gurgle, twitch, and sputter, pawing fruitlessly for release. Consciousness sloughs away with every hoarse wheeze. “Khhh...” she exhales, raveling closer and closer. Something hard and firm presses into the small of your back, pulsing: she’s enjoying this, greatly. |“Tch! Grrrrgh!!” [sophora.nameKnown |Sophora |The Jumper ] escalates, angered by your squirming resistance. [pc.isTaur |From her perch on your ‘tauric spine, she digs the soles of her feet into the L-bend between animal and anthro bodies, pulling so hard that the front of your legs begin lifting from the ground. |You discern a shift; the firmness of her erection disappears and the flat hardness of her spine replaces it; suddenly, your body is hoisted like you’ve just been curved improperly over an exercise ball. That ‘ball’ turns out to be the rabbit’s curled body. ] Saliva dribbles from your dry lips as you flail uselessly, suspended over a rock by an untouchable wire robbing you of life energy. “Gggggrrrhhh...!” The motor on her wrist creaks, clicks, and buzzes loudly, new hydraulic strength matching organic might. You can’t do anything like this but thrash... sink deeper into darkness and despair... |[var0 |Zhèng Shi |Mhen’ga |Tarkus |Myrellion |Dhaal ] becomes a black chessboard in your fading periphery. For one merciful second the suffocating stress abates — [pc.isTaur |you crumple to the ground and feel her control loosen for a tiny, insignificant moment |you’re slid from her back onto your front. ] In a mad scramble to free yourself, you pluck for the wire only to get strangled harder. The futility of your situation is clarified as your eyes clench shut; a knee presses into the small of your back, twisting you even further into a sawing grasp. Your struggles are diminishing — there’s only one more chance to break free. ]

[var0 |Willpower alone won’t save you from this nightmare. [sophora.nameKnown |Sophora |The laquine ] prowls about your [pc.mf |groaning |moaning ], recumbent form. This hurts you most of all. The systematic torture of your person — laid out, paralyzed, numbed, enervated — carries on; you’re cut, kicked, punched, pushed to your front. She torments you, lusting for the infliction of suffering. Trying to stand and fight back has you face-planted into the floor by an unyielding foot. Squirm all you want, it doesn’t matter: you’re ground into your hopelessness. [sophora.nameKnown |Sophora’s |The Jumper’s ] gloating muzzle loiters in the corner of your [pc.eye], a fangish hint at unfathomable sadism. “Krrrrrrhh...” She demonstrates her proficiency in enslavement, falling upon you like a truck full of bricks knee-first. Capture, to her, isn’t a simple matter of cuffing, gagging, and blindfolding: she wants you to be afraid. You try to remain aloof, shake your head, try to wake up. Feel the ice-cold metal snap to wrists bent achingly around your back. There’s hissing in your [pc.ear]. You have one free hand, and only one chance to break free. |Down and momentarily out, the alarming aura of a positively rabid, feral entity envelops you. Sweat rolls down your [pc.face] as you’re flipped over and mounted — a heavy weight seats itself on your back. Numbing pain flares up as strong muscles shift across your [pc.skinFurScalesNoun], gathering your [pc.arms] together, bending and twisting them for the mere fun of watching you suffer. An evil voice ‘laughs’ close in your [pc.ear]. This isn’t happening. It has to be a dream. Someone save you. A cold metal cuff latches to one wrist, beginning your subdual. Having control over your vulnerable body excites her. She savors it, gropes and molests you, rubs your cheek to the ground, smearing soot across your features. You take a deep breath, collect your thoughts, feel renewed strength soothe your pain-taut ligaments... As she reaches for your spare arm, you fight back against capture. |Completely drained and completely passive: the worst things to be in combat. [sophora.nameKnown |Sophora |The Jumper ] savors your critical weakness. Giddy, she harasses you relentlessly, inflicting what feels like a thousand superficial blows to your [pc.skinFurScalesNoun]. Emboldened, she seizes you by the neck with an intense fervency, choke-slamming you to the ground. Excitement quivers through the fingers gripped tight to your throat. Zhèng Shi spins; the sweat stings your eyes; you’re tasting the floor seconds later, [pc.arms] twisted behind your back. Nothing is real. It’s a dream. You’re not being captured. Captured...! You try to squirm away, but a metal cuff is snapped to your wrist. The spell of your delirium is momentarily broken — you start to struggle in earnest, but you only have one shot at breaking free... |Get up. On your feet, [pc.name]. It’s... not working. There’s just... no energy. Lying back and letting your opponent — bloodthirsty killer, pirate to rival the BV’s dreadlords for cruelty — circle you, see you for how weak you are. There’s no getting away from this, and if you try, the rabid laquine would just maul you. Prey. That’s what you are. A meal. Maybe not even that filling of one.[silly | According to Guido Mista, humans that eat meat taste like doody, and he survived the whole show, so can you DOUBT that guy? ] Lying down and giving in is so much easier than standing. The upside-down world flips over as she falls upon you, setting you prone and twisting your [pc.hands] behind your back. Ice-cold metal cuffs to one wrist; rough hands molest your [pc.skinFurScalesNoun] in the process, enjoying their prize, admiring the result of her brutal fervence: A [pc.raceShort] intruder brought low. Her plaything. Something hard presses into your back, and it’s not her knee. “Hrrrmm...” Captitude. Slavery. Your eyes go hollow as the realizations settle in, as the possible transformation from scion to nameless product becomes a single click away. If you... put all your strength into this final struggle, maybe... just maybe...! |[sophora.nameKnown |Sophora |The black-clad bunny ] comes at you; an invincible monster looms above before you can react. A brisk foot kicks the [pc.weapon] from your hand as she drops hers in a rapid descent, plucking your stunned, useless arm and twisting violently. As your joints are threatened with dislocation, you’re manipulated like an unruly dog until you’re lying on your front and your [pc.hand] is pressed firm to your back. From there, she mounts you, fitting the first loop of a pair of heavy-duty handcuffs to your wrist. The rabbit pants into your [pc.ear] as she snaps it shut and angles for your other [pc.hand]. [pc.isGoo | Freezing temperature radiates from the restraints, chilling your liquid form into a lump that can be bound. ] She’s trying to subdue you! Break free, or it’s all over! |Despite your writhing attempts to shake the dizziness, you’re tackled to the ground by a much stronger body. An especially violent creature slugs you in the jaw and manipulates you onto your chest with fervent tension. Brawny thighs rooting you to the floor, [sophora.nameKnown |Sophora |the laquine ] capitalizes on your weakness, seizing one [pc.arm], twisting it around, and slapping a cold metal cuff around it. Thickening cockmeat presses into your [pc.skinFurScalesNoun]. Your mind is so heavy that you can’t focus on anything, the wobbling dizziness rushing over you in waves. Your other arm is grasped. Reality sets in, alerting you to something that really does make your blood chill and your skin pale: capture. A cry escapes your lips, a hoarse little note, and then a yell. You start to fight back... |You’re out of stamina and completely exhausted. Fate is tempted, and she’s found rabidly salivating. [sophora.nameKnown |Sophora |The ravening rabbit ] circles you warily — smugly. She savors her opportunity... and then, she strikes, bringing you to your [pc.knees] with a single kick and shoving you down, fingertips riveted to the back of your head. What a thrill you are to her — bulging dickflesh grinds against your [pc.skinFurScalesNoun]. The first half of an ice-cold restraint is cuffed to your wrist. The metal cinches perfectly around the contours; you struggle in a sweat, trying to dig out any possible strength. Your glands manage to serve up a sudden burst of energy halfway through your apprehension. She loves this. Struggle for your life. ]

[var0 |“Nnggh...!” you cry out, and gasp as your free arm is grappled, laid on your back next to its already-subdued twin, its spasming fingers straining for relief. The knee that is currently crushing your spine presses harder, its owner whisper-cackling in your [pc.ear]. A bit more pressure and you scream; you capitulate, too pained to give it another go. Somebody strong and rough is making erotic your capture. She can’t win... you can’t lose like this...! |She rolls her tongue, pinioning both of your [pc.hands] together — just in range of the open cuff. You spasm like a beached sturgeon... getting nowhere. Freedom seems the remotest possibility now. You close your eyes, try to ignore the sneering glee in her voice as you wriggle to no effect. After you’ve come so far, surely you can get out of this. If you can’t break free, it’s all over. |Snap. It’s over. Ice-cold energy radiates from the inner lining of the hi-tech handcuffs binding your [pc.hands] in an inhumane position. You were a threat, now neutralized. The Jumper runs a gloved hand [pc.hasHair |through your hair |over your head ], fingers gripping possessively. A sudden clench, and she grinds your face into the dirt, the soot, the prints of a million footsteps. The silence is eerie. You think you might wake up, but you’re not going anywhere. She has you right where she wants you. The hunt is over. ]
